name: Three Alemanas
preceding_figure_names: Advanced Hip Twists, Closed Hip Twist, Curl, Fan, Hockey Stick, Open Hip Twist, Opening Out From Reverse Top, Progressive Walks Forward, Spiral, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R), Three Threes
following_figure_names: Circular Hip Twists, Continuous Hip Twists, Advanced Hip Twists, Sliding Doors
notes:
Note:
There are a lot of turns/twists. Step onto foot, axis moved to the new standing foot, turn/twist around axis (shoulder first, hip follows), release free hip, move to new axis and start over.
One coach's imagery: rotisserie chicken on a skewer. The axis/skewer does not change, shift, break or move. chicken rotates around skewer.

steps.action: Step to side with part weight
Raise L hand above Lady's R shoulder and circle counter‑clockwise
comments: Raise L hand above Lady's R shoulder and circle it counter‑clockwise.

steps.action: Slight leftwards step, then turn underarm allowing LF to cross loosely in front of RF without weight (Spiral Turn)
steps.amount_of_turn: 1/8 to L, then further 3/4 to L
comments: Small step onto RF first (don't do shoulders yet), then turn shoulders.
Different styles of spiral turn: wrap foot (wing the foot, do not sickle foot), high spiral, locking ankles.

steps.amount_of_turn: Almost feel like stepping away from Man
comments: LF fwd underneath shoulder, keep very small steps, don't travel too much, do not step big outside body.

steps.amount_of_turn: The turn is made at end of previous beat
comments: Pressed Fwd Walk. Lady should bring her weight well fwd, responding to Man's tone in his L arm.
Open L hip up, stretching the body (L hip back, R chest fwd to Man), release/drop R hip down.
L arm shoot out to L side.
